data.title: SmartCentres Declares Distribution for April 2026
data.description: In Toronto, SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: SRU.UN) declared a distribution for April 2026 at $0.15417 per unit, totaling $1.85 annually. This distribution is set to be paid on May 15, 2026, to unitholders recorded as of April 30, 2026. SmartCentres is recognized as one of Canada's top fully integrated REITs, boasting a premier mixed-use portfolio.

data.title: Bank of America Analysts Raise Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
data.description: In its latest report, Bank of America Corp (NYSE: BAC) announced positive first-quarter earnings. The company surpassed analyst expectations with quarterly earnings reaching $1.11 per share, exceeding the projected $1.00 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales amounted to $30.272 billion, surpassing the estimated $29.931 billion. Chairman and CEO Brian Moynihan expressed satisfaction with the company's strong start in 2026, highlighting a 25% increase in earnings per share and a net income of $8.6 billion. Operating leverage also saw an increase of 290 basis points, contributing to overall improvements. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teledyne FLIR Defense Wins $35+ Million Surveillance System Contract for Reconnaissance Vehicles
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated revealed that its subsidiary, Teledyne FLIR Defense, secured a significant contract valued at over $35 million from WB Electronics S.A. to supply reconnaissance vehicles with TacFLIR® 280-HDEP medium-range multi-spectral surveillance systems. These systems are tailored for diverse land missions and boast top-notch daylight and thermal imaging capabilities, coupled with robust video processing and Aided Target Recognition features.

data.title: WAL's technical setup hints at retesting $0.12 before a possible 40% drop, with a final push expected in 48 hours. Support at $0.05.
data.description: The recent increase in WAL stock has led to the formation of a bull trap pattern at resistance marks. Technical analysis indicates a potential increase to $0.12 in the next 48 hours before a significant drop towards the $0.05 support level.
US Energy Secretary Wright: The US is going to take more steps to keep gasoline prices down.

data.title: GetWhys Raises $5.2M Round to Close the Research-to-Outcome Gap for B2B GTM Teams
data.description: A platform driven by AI technology transforms authentic buyer data into tailored messages and support tools to enhance revenue results for major companies like Intel, Verizon, and CDW. Based in Boise, Idaho, on April 16, 2026, GetWhys revealed securing $5.2 million in a heavily oversubscribed funding round. This investment aims to propel the expansion of its services and operations.

data.title: Medical Solutions donates $150,000 to support SeriousFun Children's Network summer camps
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on April 16, 2026, Medical Solutions, a prominent healthcare workforce partner in the country, reaffirmed its commitment to SeriousFun Children's Network with a generous donation of $150,000. This donation is aimed at supporting summer camp nurses who cater to children with...

data.title: Fresha Launches Searchable Professional Profiles, Redefining Discovery in Beauty and Wellness Across the Global Selfcare Economy
data.description: In London on April 16, 2026, Fresha introduced Professional Profiles, a new feature on its AI-powered booking platform for beauty and wellness. This update is considered one of the most impactful advancements in the industry, marking a significant change in how users discover and book services. Fresha is recognized as the top global platform in this sector, with a large user base and a strong market presence.

data.title: Firstsource Launches Kairos -- The Operating System Powering Intelligence That Operates
data.description: Firstsource Solutions Limited, a company under RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group, has recently unveiled Kairos, a new operating system aimed at bridging the disparity between the potential of artificial intelligence and its practical application. The announcement was made on April 16, 2026, in New York and Mumbai. Firstsource Solutions Limited is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE: FSL) and the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE: 532809). Kairos is expected to revolutionize AI operations by closing the gap between theoretical capabilities and real-world implementation, offering a promising solution to this ongoing challenge in the technological landscape.
